workflow_rationale: Adding new VFX subsystem following existing SoundManager/SoundBinder patterns. Requires infrastructure (ActionIds + payloads), new manager (VFXManager), event binder (BrickGameVFXBinder), and game object integration (Brick, PhysicsBall event publishing).

phases.name: Infrastructure - ActionIds & Payloads
phases.description: Add BrickGame_BallBounce ActionId and VFX-specific payload structs (BrickDestroyedVFXPayload, BallBounceVFXPayload) to the event system.

subtasks.description: Add BrickGame_BallBounce ActionId and VFX payloads to IAction.cs
subtasks.notes: Added BrickGame_BallBounce to ActionId enum, created BrickDestroyedVFXPayload (ScoreValue, Position, BrickColor) and BallBounceVFXPayload (Position) readonly structs implementing IActionPayload. Commit: f4001df

phases.name: VFXManager Creation & Registration
phases.description: Create VFXManager POCO class with 5 particle system prefabs (brick_break, ball_bounce, stage_clear, victory, score_popup), VFXAutoReturn coroutine helper, and register in Managers.cs service locator.

subtasks.description: Create VFXManager.cs POCO class with particle system pooling and VFXAutoReturn MonoBehaviour helper
subtasks.notes: Created VFXManager POCO class with Init()/Clear() lifecycle, 5 prefab creation methods (CreateBrickBreakPrefab, CreateBallBouncePrefab, CreateStageClearPrefab, CreateVictoryPrefab, CreateScorePopupPrefab), SpawnVFX(name, position, color?) method using PoolManager.Pop/Push, and VFXAutoReturn MonoBehaviour for auto-return via coroutine. Commit: b25c77d

subtasks.description: Register VFXManager in Managers.cs (field, accessor, Init in Awake, Clear in OnDestroy)

verification.expected: VFXManager registered with field, accessor, Init, Clear

subtasks.notes: Added private VFXManager _vfx = new VFXManager() field, public static VFXManager VFX accessor, _vfx.Init() in Awake(), _vfx?.Clear() in OnDestroy(). Follows exact SoundManager registration pattern. Commit: 1dae2c8

phases.name: Event Publishing from Game Objects
phases.description: Add ActionBus event publishing from Brick.cs (BrickDestroyed with position+color) and PhysicsBall.cs (BallBounce with contact position).

subtasks.description: Add ActionBus publish in Brick.cs HandleBrickDestruction for BrickGame_BrickDestroyed with VFX payload
subtasks.notes: Added Managers.PublishAction(ActionId.BrickGame_BrickDestroyed, new BrickDestroyedVFXPayload(originalWave, transform.position, brickColor)) in HandleBrickDestruction(). Gets brick color from SpriteRenderer. Commit: e525a6b

subtasks.description: Add BallBounce VFX event publish in PhysicsBall.cs on brick/wall and plank collisions

verification.expected: BallBounce events published in collision handlers

subtasks.notes: Added Managers.PublishAction(ActionId.BrickGame_BallBounce, new BallBounceVFXPayload(contactPoint)) in HandleBrickOrWallCollision() and HandlePlankCollision(). Commit: 3c196f8

phases.name: VFX Binder - ActionBus to VFXManager Wiring
phases.description: Create BrickGameVFXBinder class that subscribes to ActionBus events and triggers VFXManager.SpawnVFX, and register it in GameManager.cs lifecycle.

subtasks.description: Create BrickGameVFXBinder.cs following BrickGameSoundBinder pattern (IDisposable, Initialize/Dispose, ActionBus subscriptions)

verification.expected: Class with IDisposable and SpawnVFX calls found

subtasks.notes: Created BrickGameVFXBinder : IDisposable with Initialize() subscribing to BrickGame_BrickDestroyed, BrickGame_BallBounce, BrickGame_GameStateChanged. OnBrickDestroyed uses BrickDestroyedVFXPayload for position+color. OnBallBounce uses BallBounceVFXPayload. OnGameStateChanged triggers vfx_stage_clear/vfx_victory based on GamePhase. Commit: f258b6f

subtasks.description: Register BrickGameVFXBinder in GameManager.cs (field, Initialize in InitializeBrickGame, Dispose in CleanupBrickGame)

verification.expected: VFXBinder registered with field, Initialize, Dispose

subtasks.notes: Added private BrickGameVFXBinder _vfxBinder field, null-guarded initialization in InitializeBrickGame(), and Dispose/null in CleanupBrickGame(). Follows exact _soundBinder pattern. Commit: 2109043

phases.name: Integration & Compile Verification
phases.description: Verify full VFX pipeline works end-to-end: event publishing → ActionBus → VFXBinder → VFXManager → PoolManager → ParticleSystem. Verify 0 compile errors.

subtasks.description: Full compilation check and end-to-end pipeline verification (code review)

verification.instructions: Verify all 7 files compile correctly. Check cross-references: IAction.cs types used in Brick.cs, PhysicsBall.cs, BrickGameVFXBinder.cs. VFXManager constants used in BrickGameVFXBinder.cs. Managers.VFX used in BrickGameVFXBinder.cs. All using statements correct.

subtasks.notes: All 7 files verified: correct using statements, type references, namespace usage, PoolManager API calls, ActionBus subscribe/publish patterns. Zero compile errors confirmed via code review. Commit: 9834b8b

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1-infrastructure, modify different file sets (Managers vs Controllers)

parallelism.speedup_estimate: 1.3x faster than sequential (2 phases parallelizable, but single Unity project benefits from sequential compile checks)

acceptance_criteria: 벽돌 파괴 시 색상별 파티클 버스트 발생
공 바운스 시 스파크 이펙트 발생
PoolManager 통한 파티클 풀링으로 GC 최소화

verification_steps.name: Pattern Compliance
verification_steps.expected_outcome: VFXManager follows SoundManager POCO pattern, VFXBinder follows SoundBinder IDisposable pattern

verification_strategy.reasoning: Low risk additive feature - no existing behavior modified, only new files and event publishing added. Unity project has no CLI-runnable tests; verification is code-review based compile check and pattern compliance.

unit_tests.reason: Unity project - no CLI-runnable unit test framework configured

integration_tests.reason: Unity project - integration tested via Unity Editor play mode

e2e_tests.reason: Unity project - E2E tested via Unity Editor play mode

browser_verification.reason: Unity game, not a web application

checks: All type references resolve (IActionPayload, readonly structs, Vector3, Color)
PoolManager API usage matches existing pattern
ActionBus subscribe/publish pattern matches existing usage

issues_found: vfx_score_popup prefab created but not event-wired (by design - UI layer handles text popups)
Shader.Find used at runtime (low risk for built-in shaders)
Dual brick-destroyed payloads exist (backward compatible, no breaking change)

commits.message: Add BrickGame_BallBounce ActionId and VFX payloads
Create VFXManager.cs POCO class with particle system pooling
Add ActionBus publish in Brick.cs HandleBrickDestruction
Add BallBounce VFX event publish in PhysicsBall.cs
